Fendit Security
!

Activate Protection

Enter your 6-digit code from your IT administrator.

Installing Fendit…

Connecting to Fendit cloud...

Step 1 of 7 14%
Permission Required

One More Step

macOS requires explicit permission
before Fendit can monitor this device.

A System Settings window should have opened automatically. If it closed, use the button below.

1

In Full Disk Access, find Fendit Security in the list. If it's missing, click + to add it.

2

Toggle it ON. Enter your Mac password when prompted — this is required by Apple.

3

Return here and click Check Again to finish.

Protection Active

Your device is now monitored
by Fendit Security.

Real-time monitoring active · All interceptors engaged

Closing in 3 seconds…
